creator: ports@christianserving.org
text:
>Submitter-Id:	current-users
>Originator:	Jim Riggs
>Organization:	
>Confidential:	no 
>Synopsis:	Re: ports/175946: [NEW PORT] devel/sope: An extensive set of GNUstep web application frameworks
>Severity:	non-critical
>Priority:	low
>Category:	ports 
>Class:		change-request
>Release:	FreeBSD 9.0-RELEASE amd64
>Environment:
System: FreeBSD zion.christianserving.org 9.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 9.0-RELEASE #0: Tue Apr 24 09:28:22 CDT 2012
>Description:
Update to 2.0.5 and fix builds on 9.1.

Redports builds for 8.3 and 9.1 were successful:

https://redports.org/buildarchive/20130412024200-52230/

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: new)
>How-To-Repeat:
>Fix:

--- .shar begins here ---
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	sope
#	sope/files
#	sope/files/patch-configure
#	sope/files/patch-sope-core__NGStreams__NGActiveSocket.m
#	sope/Makefile
#	sope/distinfo
#	sope/pkg-descr
#	sope/pkg-plist
#
echo c - sope
mkdir -p sope > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - sope/files
mkdir -p sope/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - sope/files/patch-configure
sed 's/^X//' >sope/files/patch-configure << 'fe1e450c82a81b6863466cee05f90b51'
X--- configure.orig	2012-12-06 09:56:03.000000000 -0600
X+++ configure	2013-01-21 12:35:30.000000000 -0600
X@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
X-#!/bin/bash
X+#!/bin/sh
X 
X #
X # Note: When adding make options to this script, ensure that the source still
X@@ -41,7 +41,7 @@
X fi
X 
X # TODO: add pg_config, mysql_config etc!
X-LINK_SYSLIBDIRS="-L/usr/local/pgsql/lib -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/lib"
X+LINK_SYSLIBDIRS="-L/usr/local/lib/mysql -L/usr/local/lib/pgsql -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/lib"
X 
X # ******************** usage ********************
X 
fe1e450c82a81b6863466cee05f90b51
echo x - sope/files/patch-sope-core__NGStreams__NGActiveSocket.m
sed 's/^X//' >sope/files/patch-sope-core__NGStreams__NGActiveSocket.m << 'c179d7855d64c139270c0843fba189d4'
X--- sope-core/NGStreams/NGActiveSocket.m.orig	2013-02-02 11:08:31.000000000 -0600
X+++ sope-core/NGStreams/NGActiveSocket.m	2013-02-02 11:08:42.000000000 -0600
X@@ -19,6 +19,8 @@
X   02111-1307, USA.
X */
X 
X+#include <sys/types.h>
X+
X #include <netinet/in.h>
X #include <netinet/tcp.h>
X 
c179d7855d64c139270c0843fba189d4
echo x - sope/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >sope/Makefile << '71d594d412a7a20f7f95bc5d51f0c00f'
X# Created by: Jim Riggs <ports@christianserving.org>
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=		sope
XPORTVERSION=		2.0.5
XCATEGORIES=		devel gnustep
XMASTER_SITES=		http://www.sogo.nu/files/downloads/SOGo/Sources/
XDISTNAME=		SOPE-${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=		ports@christianserving.org
XCOMMENT=		An extensive set of GNUstep web application frameworks
X
XLICENSE=		LGPL20
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=		ldap:${PORTSDIR}/net/openldap24-client
X
XWRKSRC=			${WRKDIR}/SOPE
X
XOPTIONS_DEFINE=		LDAP MYSQL PGSQL
XOPTIONS_DEFAULT=	LDAP MYSQL
X
X.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
X
X.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MLDAP}
XUSE_OPENLDAP=		yes
XPLIST_SUB+=		LDAP=""
X.else
XPLIST_SUB+=		LDAP="@comment "
X.endif
X
X.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MMYSQL}
XUSE_MYSQL=		yes
XPLIST_SUB+=		MYSQL=""
X.else
XPLIST_SUB+=		MYSQL="@comment "
X.endif
X
X.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MPGSQL}
XUSE_PGSQL=		yes
XPLIST_SUB+=		PGSQL=""
X.else
XPLIST_SUB+=		PGSQL="@comment "
X.endif
X
XUSE_GMAKE=		yes
XUSE_GNUSTEP=		yes
XUSE_GNUSTEP_BASE=	yes
XUSE_GNUSTEP_CONFIGURE=	yes
XUSE_GNUSTEP_BUILD=	yes
XUSE_GNUSTEP_INSTALL=	yes
XUSE_GNUSTEP_MAKE=	yes
XUSE_LDCONFIG=		yes
X
XHAS_CONFIGURE=		yes
XCONFIGURE_ENV+=		PATH=${LOCALBASE}/bin:${GNUSTEP_SYSTEM_TOOLS}:$$PATH
XCONFIGURE_ARGS=		--prefix=${GNUSTEP_LOCAL_ROOT} --enable-debug --disable-strip
X
XMAKEFILE=		GNUmakefile
XMAKE_ENV+=		${CONFIGURE_ENV}
X
Xpost-patch:
X.if ! ${PORT_OPTIONS:MLDAP}
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} '/checkLinking.*"ldap"/d' ${WRKSRC}/configure
X.endif
X
X.if ! ${PORT_OPTIONS:MMYSQL}
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} '/checkLinking.*"mysqlclient"/d' ${WRKSRC}/configure
X.endif
X
X.if ! ${PORT_OPTIONS:MPGSQL}
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} '/checkLinking.*"pq"/d' ${WRKSRC}/configure
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
71d594d412a7a20f7f95bc5d51f0c00f
echo x - sope/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >sope/distinfo << '6fef449be01ca23355d10c9109b44c75'
XSHA256 (SOPE-2.0.5.tar.gz) = c9246829ad57addb58e244e654bff86380f3ef6abff7153c4138c7a2c701ca5b
XSIZE (SOPE-2.0.5.tar.gz) = 2249665
6fef449be01ca23355d10c9109b44c75
echo x - sope/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >sope/pkg-descr << '44acddc044257504500c6a951e8fbb69'
XSOPE is an extensive set of frameworks which form a complete Web
Xapplication server environment. Besides the Apple WebObjects
Xcompatible appserver extended with Zope concepts, it contains a large
Xset of reusable classes: XML processing (SAX, DOM, XML-RPC),
XMIME/IMAP4 processing, LDAP connectivity, RDBMS connectivity, and
XiCalendar parsing.
X
XWWW: http://sogo.nu/
44acddc044257504500c6a951e8fbb69
